(async) getAGSLineItem(consumer_key, lineitem_url) → {Object}

Get a single line item from an LTI 1.3 AGS endpoint
Parameters:
Name Type Description
consumer_key string the key of the consumer
lineitem_url string the URL of the line item to retrieve

Throws:
if the request fails
Type
Error
Returns:
the line item object from the LMS

Object

(async) getAGSLineItems(consumer_key, lineitems_url, resource_link_id) → {Array}

Get all line items from an LTI 1.3 AGS lineitems endpoint
Parameters:
Name Type Default Description
consumer_key string the key of the consumer
lineitems_url string the URL of the lineitems collection to retrieve
resource_link_id string | null null optional resource link ID filter
Source:
  • lib/lti13.js, line 1084
Throws:
if the request fails
Type
Error
Returns:
the array of line item objects from the LMS

Array

(async) getAGSResults(consumer_key, results_url, user_id) → {Array}

Fetch AGS results for a line item from an LTI consumer via LTI 1.3 AGS
Parameters:
Name Type Default Description
consumer_key string the consumer key
results_url string the results URL for the line item
user_id string | null null optional user ID to filter results

Throws:
if the request fails
Type
Error
Returns:
array of result objects

Array

(async) getAccessToken(consumer_key, scopes) → {string|null}

Get an access token for the given LTI consumer
Parameters:
Name Type Description
consumer_key string the key of the consumer
scopes string the scopes to request
Source:
  • lib/lti13.js, line 243
Returns:
a string containing the access token or null unable to get token

string | null

(async) sendDeepLinkResponse(res, data, return_url, consumer_key) → {Object}

Send Deep Link Response
Parameters:
Name Type Description
res Object the Express response object
data Object the data to include in the response
return_url string the URL to send the response to
consumer_key string the key of the consumer to get an access token for

Throws:
if the request fails
Type
Error
Returns:
the response from the LMS

Object

(async) sendRegistrationResponse(config, endpoint, consumer, token) → {Object}

Send Dynamic Registration Response
Parameters:
Name Type Default Description
config Object the registration data to send to the LMS
endpoint string the registration endpoint to send the data to
consumer Object the consumer object containing client_id and deployment_id to update after successful registration
token string | null null an optional access token to include in the request for platforms that require it
Source:
  • lib/lti13.js, line 392
Throws:
if the registration fails
Type
Error
Returns:
the response from the LMS

Object

validateAGSLineItemRequest(req)

Validate an AGS Line Item Request token scope
Parameters:
Name Type Description
req Object the Express request object (must have req.lti13Token set by middleware)

Throws:
if the token does not include lineitem.readonly or lineitem scope

Error

(async) verifyDeepLinkResponse(req) → {Object}

Verify an LTI 1.3 Deep Linking Response JWT and extract content items
Parameters:
Name Type Description
req Object the Express request object (must have req.body.JWT and req.params.token)
Source:
  • lib/lti13.js, line 793
Throws:
if the token is invalid, the JWT cannot be verified, or content items are missing
Type
Error
Returns:
an object with content_items array and context from the pending deep link record
Type
Object
